calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff WHITE & WHITLEY GROUP, LLC. a Limited Liability Company
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant STELLA T SCHOTT
No witness present.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank and against Defendant Gawzia I. Indrawes as follows:
Principal $43,059.64
Pre-Judgment Interest $18,663.11
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $370.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $62,092.75
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon Tang, Attorney at Law, Tel. 510.896.9411, for plaintiffs and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF WHITE & WHITLEY GROUP, LLC, Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is granted. The matter requested to be admitted in Plaintiff's Request for Admission, Set one are hereby deemed admitted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
